steps.assistant_text: Migrated func_0000FBCC out of the -O2 bootup_uso_tail1.c into a dedicated -O0 sub-file (3-way split: tail1 F81C-FAE8 / o0_FBCC / tail1_bot FC28-FEE8). At -O2 the constant-folded set=0 dead branch is eliminated; at -O0 IDO keeps both arms + the dead 'b .+1; nop' BB marker, reproducing the 23-insn target. -O0 emits 24 insns; trailing nop clipped via TRUNCATE_TEXT:=0x5C. tail1_bot TRUNCATE:=0x4C8 keeps FEE8 ending at bootup 0x100F0.
